using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

// 1. Context Definition (Provided)
public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

// 2. State Tracking for Resumability
public sealed class RunState
{
    public Guid Id { get; } = Guid.NewGuid();
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; }
    public int CompletedTests { get; set; }
    public List<double> RawResults { get; } = new();
    public DateTime LastHeartbeat { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
    public string? FailureReason { get; set; }

    public RunState(BenchmarkContext context) => Context = context;
}

// 3. The Runner API
public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner : IDisposable
{
    private readonly ConcurrentQueue<RunState> _queue = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _dockerLock = new(1, 1); // Single Model Server Constraint
    private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();
    private readonly string _stateFile = "benchmark_state.json"; // Simplified persistence path

    public ResumableBenchmarkRunner()
    {
        LoadState();
    }

    public void Enqueue(BenchmarkContext context)
    {
        var state = new RunState(context);
        _queue.Enqueue(state);
        SaveState();
    }
